titles.title: Cutting COSTS Act of 2025
Cutting COSTS Act of 2025
Cutting Cumbersome Overhead for Small-farm Testing Savings Act of 2025
To direct the Secretary of Agriculture to establish a program for making payments to covered producers for the cost of carrying out GAP audits, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.
Referred to the Subcommittee on General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Nutrition and Foreign Agriculture.

committee.name: House Agriculture
committee.subcommittee: General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit
